title: US hits Iran's Karaj surface-to-surface missile plant; satellite images show before-and-after impact
summary_full: US forces struck an Iranian missile manufacturing facility in Karaj as part of "Operation Epic Fury," causing extensive damage and rendering the site inoperable. This action is part of a broader US campaign to counter Iran's proliferation and maritime threats. Military assessments indicate a significant decline in Iran's missile launch capacity, though risks from dispersed capabilities and proxy forces remain.
